description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 7, 2025 at 2:51 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Culver City, California was in a collision 
involving a curb on S. Robertson Blvd at Hoke Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northbound on S. Robertson Boulevard in autonomous mode when it approached a queue of traffic stopped 
for a red light at the intersection with Venice Boulevard. The Waymo AV slowed, and began to change lanes to the right of the queue of 
traffic when the front and rear passenger tires made contact with the curb on the east side of S. Robertson Boulevard. The test driver of the 
Waymo AV transitioned to manual mode after Waymo AV made contact with the curb. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 
ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present in the driver’s seating position. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
